languages.text: {n}Когда вы прикасаетесь к сплошной кровавой ране, в которую превратилось все тело Ларии ниже шеи, она сдавленно стонет сквозь зубы, и на несколько секунд ее дыхание прерывается. Похоже, боль, причиняемая ей последствиями пыток, столь сильна, что любой осмотр может привести к мгновенной смерти от болевого шока. Но жизнь в ней все еще теплится — а значит, существует шанс спасти ее, пусть и иллюзорный.{/n}

{n}When you touch the endless bloody wound that the entirety of Laria's body below the neck has become, she makes a muffled groan through her teeth, and for a few seconds her breathing stops. It seems the pain from the torture alone is so intense that any examination could bring about instant death from shock. Yet life still flickers within her, which means a chance to save her remains, however faint.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Когда вы прикасаетесь к сплошной кровавой ране, в которую превратилось все тело Ларии ниже шеи, она сдавленно стонет сквозь зубы, и на несколько секунд ее дыхание прерывается. Похоже, боль, причиняемая ей последствиями пыток, столь сильна, что любой осмотр может привести к мгновенной смерти от болевого шока. Но жизнь в ней все еще теплится — а значит, существует шанс спасти ее, пусть и иллюзорный.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}When you touch the unbroken bloody wound that the entirety of Laria's body below the neck has become, she emits a muffled groan through her teeth, and for a few seconds her breathing stops. It seems the pain caused by the aftermath of the torture is so intense that any examination could bring about instant death from shock. Yet life still flickers within her, which means a chance to save her remains, however illusory.{/n}

Yet life still flickers within her, which means a chance to save her remains, however faint.{/n}

languages.text: {n}当你触碰到菈丽雅那从脖子往下遍布血淋淋伤口的身体时，她从牙缝间挤出一声闷哼，呼吸都停滞了几秒。看来光是折磨造成的剧痛就已经强烈到任何检查都可能让她瞬间死于休克。然而她体内依旧残留着生命的火花，这意味着她仍有一线生机，哪怕希望极其渺茫。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you touch the endless bloody wound that the entirety of Laria's body below the neck has become, she makes a muffled groan through her teeth, and for a few seconds her breathing stops. Yet life still flickers within her, which means a chance to save her remains, however faint.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cuando tocas la herida ensangrentada en la que se ha convertido el cuerpo de Laria de cuello para abajo, emite un gemido ahogado y, por unos segundos, deja de respirar. Parece que el dolor de la tortura es tan intenso que cualquier análisis podría matarla solo con la conmoción. Sin embargo aún vive, lo que significa que, por tenue que sea, hay una posibilidad de salvarla.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you touch the endless bloody wound that the entirety of Laria's body below the neck has become, she makes a muffled groan through her teeth, and for a few seconds her breathing stops. It seems the pain from the torture alone is so intense that any examination could bring about instant death from shock. Yet life still flickers within her, which means a chance to save her remains, however faint.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lorsque vous effleurez la plaie béante qu'est devenu le corps de Laria en dessous du cou, elle serre la mâchoire, lâche un grognement et cesse de respirer quelques secondes. Il semble que la douleur infligée par la torture soit si intense que tout examen pourrait lui causer un choc fatal. Cependant, une étincelle de vie subsiste en elle, laissant entrevoir une chance de la sauver, aussi ténue soit-elle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you touch the endless bloody wound that the entirety of Laria's body below the neck has become, she makes a muffled groan through her teeth, and for a few seconds her breathing stops. Yet life still flickers within her, which means a chance to save her remains, however faint.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria'nın boynunun altındaki bedeninin dönüştüğü o bitmek bilmez kanlı yaraya dokunuyorsun. Dişlerinin arasından boğuk bir inilti çıkarıyor ve birkaç saniyeliğine nefesi duruyor. Görünüşe göre sadece işkenceden kaynaklanan acı bile o kadar yoğun ki, herhangi bir inceleme, şoktan kaynaklı ani bir ölüme yol açabilir. Yine de içinde hayat hâlâ titriyor, bu da ne kadar zayıf olursa olsun onun kurtulmak için şansının olduğu anlamına geliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you touch the endless bloody wound that the entirety of Laria's body below the neck has become, she makes a muffled groan through her teeth, and for a few seconds her breathing stops. It seems the pain from the torture alone is so intense that any examination could bring about instant death from shock. Yet life still flickers within her, which means a chance to save her remains, however faint.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als du die blutende Wunde berührst, zu der Larias Körper vom Hals abwärts geworden ist, stöhnt sie durch ihre zusammengebissenen Zähne und hört einige Sekunden auf zu atmen. Offenbar sind die Schmerzen der Folter so intensiv, dass sie allein der Schock einer Untersuchung töten könnte. Und doch regt sich noch Leben in ihr. Es besteht also eine kleine Chance, das, was von ihr übrig ist, zu retten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}首の下のリアの全身が血まみれの傷になってしまった時、彼女は歯を食いしばって苦い唸り声をあげ、数秒間呼吸を止める。拷問の痛みだけで、検査をするだけで即死するかもしれない。それでも、リアの命は消えていない。救うチャンスは、まだ残っている。{/n}
